description: Spring RTS Common Utility API - logging, debugging, and general-purpose functions available in both synced and unsynced code.

Logging & Debug.description: Functions for printing messages to the engine log. These are available in ALL contexts (synced, unsynced, widgets, gadgets).

functions.name: Spring.Echo
functions.description: Prints a message to the infolog and stdout. Accepts multiple arguments which are concatenated. This is the most common logging function in Spring gadgets.

functions.name: Spring.Log
functions.signature: Spring.Log(string section, number logLevel, string msg1 [, string msg2, ...])
functions.description: Logs a message under a named section with a log level. logLevel constants: LOG.DEBUG, LOG.INFO, LOG.WARNING, LOG.ERROR, LOG.FATAL.

Game Frame & Time.description: Functions to query current game frame and time.

functions.name: Spring.GetGameFrame
functions.description: Returns the current game frame number (number). 30 frames = 1 second at normal speed.

functions.name: Spring.GetGameSeconds
functions.description: Returns the current game time in seconds (number).

Team & Player Info.description: Functions to query team and player metadata.

functions.name: Spring.GetTeamList
functions.description: Returns a table of teamIDs. If allyTeamID is given, returns only teams in that alliance.

functions.name: Spring.GetGaiaTeamID
functions.description: Returns the teamID of the Gaia (neutral) team.

functions.name: Spring.GetAllyTeamList
functions.description: Returns a table of all allyTeamIDs.

UnitDef Lookup.description: Global tables for looking up unit and feature definitions (not Spring.* functions but essential globals).

functions.name: UnitDefs
functions.description: Global table mapping unitDefID -> UnitDef table. UnitDef contains fields like: name, humanName, metalCost, energyCost, maxHealth, speed, extractsMetal, energyMake, etc.

functions.name: UnitDefNames
functions.description: Global table mapping unit name string (e.g. 'armcom') -> UnitDef table. Useful for looking up unitDefID by name.

functions.name: FeatureDefs
functions.description: Global table mapping featureDefID -> FeatureDef table. FeatureDef contains fields like: name, metal, energy, reclaimable, destructable.

functions.name: FeatureDefNames
functions.description: Global table mapping feature name string -> FeatureDef table.
